name: rerankers (Unified Re-Ranking Library)

auth.notes: Local models: no auth. API-based (Cohere, Jina, RankGPT): API key required

performance.notes: Varies by backend: FlashRank (5ms), cross-encoder (50ms), Cohere API (100-300ms)

agent_readiness.notes: Unified re-ranking API across multiple backends. from rerankers import Reranker. ranker = Reranker('cross-encoder'). results = ranker.rank(query='What is Python?', docs=['Python is a programming language', 'Python is a snake']). results.top_k(3). results[0].score, results[0].text, results[0].rank. Backends: cross-encoder (transformers), flashrank, colbert, cohere, jina, rankgpt, llm-layerwise. ranker = Reranker('cohere', api_key='...'). ranker = Reranker('flashrank'). ranker = Reranker('colbert', model='colbert-ir/colbertv2.0'). results.results list of RankedResult. Unified interface regardless of backend.

gotchas: Backend-dependent behavior — same API, different accuracy/speed trade-offs
ColBERT backend requires large VRAM — GPU memory may be limiting
API backends (Cohere, Jina) incur cost and require internet access
RankGPT requires LLM inference — expensive for large candidate sets
Model downloads on first use for local backends
best_when: RAG pipelines where you want to swap re-ranking backends without code changes
Experimentation with different re-ranker types (cross-encoder, ColBERT, LLM)
Production RAG with Cohere or Jina API re-ranking
Research comparing re-ranking methods with consistent interface
avoid_when: When only one re-ranker backend is needed (use that library directly)
Real-time constraints with API backends (latency unpredictable)
When fine-tuned domain-specific re-rankers are needed
summary: rerankers provides a unified API across cross-encoder, ColBERT, FlashRank, Cohere, Jina, and RankGPT re-rankers. Reranker('backend').rank(query, docs). results.top_k(n). Type-annotated. Apache-2.0 by AnswerDotAI. Best for RAG pipelines needing backend flexibility. Same interface regardless of backend. ColBERT needs GPU. API backends add latency and cost. Ideal for experimentation and production RAG.
